reviews.review_description: BeyondRea’s flexibility , 3rd Party Tools and spatial computing is a game changer. Can’t wait to see what’s next :)

I use this on the weekly basis to run meetings with my product development team, which is spreadout throughout the world - and it is AMAZING. Yes, some tweaks are still needed - such as the passthrough for the keyboard that's going to come soon as the devs promise, but the amount of money and nerves it saves us when we do weekly sprint planning and reviews is hard to underestimate. It feels like "real", no comparison with zoom, at the same time those who don't have VR devices can join via zoom to contribute; screen sharing and integration with Trello and Atlassian really helps, and the ability to inspect 3D objects and do 3D and 2D whiteboarding is something you can't do even in the "real world". Great help in our product development process!

I enjoyed, the ability to white board and the 3D tools/ stickers provided, as well as the ease of use of my standard corporate tools. I also found the full body avatar to be very cool, especially when I tried to play basketball to relax

Beyondreal is an excellent space to enhance business operations. The tablet functionality makes setting up meetings, white-boarding, and moving through spaces a breeze. The tools that allow you to scale physical objects are impressive as well. And basketball is great way to decompress!!!

reviews.review_title: The future is just around the corner
reviews.review_description:
The app helped to effectively organize a strategic session with my team. I note the user-friendly interface of the application, even without training, everything was sorted out quickly enough. The team was able to communicate and collaborate seamlessly, which significantly increased the productivity of our meeting.

A big request to the development team is to implement the ability to create teams in your personal account so that you can send an invitation to the entire team at once.

Overall, it was a cool experience and I highly recommend it to anyone who wants to manage a remote team.

We held one of our daily meetings at Beyondreal. I liked the large number of tools available for group work, especially the video player and audio player (it's cool that they made integration with youtube).

I got a special pleasure when I turned on the free hands mode. Please add teleportation without controllers so that I can throw out my controllers.

After I saw the opportunity to moderate the meeting, I realized that we would stay on your platform.
